rule_metadata.author: Austin Songer @austinsonger
rule_metadata.title: Disable PUA Protection on Windows Defender

rules.rule_text:
title: Disable PUA Protection on Windows Defender
id: 8ffc5407-52e3-478f-9596-0a7371eafe13
status: test
description: Detects disabling Windows Defender PUA protection
references:
- https://www.tenforums.com/tutorials/32236-enable-disable-microsoft-defender-pua-protection-windows-10-a.html
author: Austin Songer @austinsonger
date: 2021-08-04
modified: 2023-08-17
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1562.001
logsource:
  category: registry_set
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetObject|contains: \Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\PUAProtection
    Details: DWORD (0x00000000)
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
